title: Add Captain execution intent records
goal: Add an explicit execution_intent record for captain-run so high-impact execution is bound to a reviewed intent before any executor is invoked.

acceptance.assertion: captain-run requires a structured execution_intent for mutating actions before executor invocation.
The intent record binds action, target digest, expected_head, expected_base, evidence hashes, actor/context and timestamp without exposing secrets.
Missing, malformed or drifted intent blocks execution before any high-impact command is invoked.
Tests cover missing intent, mismatched intent, valid intent and no-secret leakage in receipts.

metadata.source: Grabowski captain-run PR #104/#106 reviews and follow-up triage
metadata.reason: PR #102 introduced captain-run pr-merge execution; execution intent was intentionally deferred.
